title: triticum monococcum var. lasiorrhachis
intro: Triticum monococcum var. lasiorrhachis is a rare and lesser-known variety of wild einkorn wheat, a type of ancient grain native to the Middle East. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Triticum monococcum var. lasiorrhachis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
